summary: FR-PERS-001 Save Model implementation complete. ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, and persistenceService.ts are fully implemented. All 4 test cases (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) are satisfied by the implementation. PR opened for review.

artifacts.name: ActionBar component
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with async handlers, QuotaExceededError handling, auto-dismiss notifications

artifacts.name: Notification component
artifacts.description: Success/error overlay with 3s auto-dismiss, robust error detection, a11y role=status

artifacts.name: persistenceService
artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0

recommended_actions: Review the PR for FR-PERS-001 on branch feature/13-save-model-persistence
Verify ActionBar.tsx handleSave uses try/catch with QuotaExceededError detection
Verify Notification.tsx auto-dismisses after 3s and uses role=status for a11y
Verify persistenceService.ts includes schema version 1.0.0 in PersistedModel
Check all 4 test IDs are covered: T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04
